_comment: Official model benchmark. Future candidates must beat the current official_model held-out test metrics (log loss first, then Brier, then calibration gaps) on the same chronological 3-way split before replacing it. Accuracy alone is never a success criterion. The final held-out test has been touched by prior diagnostics, so this promotion is based primarily on validation stability plus consistency with the held-out re-report; do not regenerate this file from a rerun without explicit sign-off.

promotion.decision_source: Run 2.1 and Run 3 validation-confirmed stronger regularization; explicit post-Run 3 promotion sign-off.
promotion.primary_basis: Five pre-test validation folds beat the old official model 5/5 with mean Platt log-loss gain 0.008862; held-out test re-report was directionally consistent with gain 0.002305.
promotion.final_test_caveat: The final held-out test was already touched in Step 5B/5B.1/5C diagnostics, so future claims should treat it as a consistency check, not a fresh independent selection signal.

official_model.name: step5c_stronger_regularized_lr_drop_weight_class_platt
official_model.label: Step 5C stronger-regularized LR, raw weight_class dropped + Platt
official_model.base_model: logistic regression on Step 3C numeric features with stronger elastic-net regularization; raw weight_class dropped; no division interaction features

validation_evidence.protocol: five expanding-window pre-test validation folds; Platt calibrated on each fold calibration window and scored on each fold validation window

official_model.test_protocol_note: Held-out test metrics are a re-report for the validation-selected candidate. The final held-out test was already touched in prior diagnostics, so the promotion claim should emphasize validation stability plus consistency with this re-report.

old_official_step3c_lr_platt._comment: Former official model before the 2026-07-07 Step 5C promotion.
old_official_step3c_lr_platt.label: Step 3C LR + Platt
old_official_step3c_lr_platt.base_model: logistic regression on Step 3C features (Step 3 + 3B + matchup interactions)

old_official_step3c_lr_platt._comment: Historical official benchmark retained for Run 4 comparisons.

step3b_lr_platt_fallback._comment: Preserved fallback benchmark if Step 3C features are ever unavailable.
